name: system-admin-mcp
description: FastMCP 3.4 server for elevated Windows system administration: NTFS file recovery, security/ACL management, disk maintenance, service orchestration, process diagnostics, system health monitoring, network auditing, startup management, and taskbar management with a React web dashboard.

tools.name: system_admin
tools.description: Consolidated portmanteau for 40+ Windows system operations: file recovery, security/permissions, disk maintenance, diagnostics, services, processes, startup, taskbar.

tools.name: manage_filesystem_watch
tools.description: Manage background filesystem monitoring via watchdog. Start/stop/list watches and retrieve captured events.

tools.name: get_comprehensive_diagnostics
tools.description: Perform a full system health audit: CPU/RAM/disk metrics, top processes, event log errors, volume usage.

tools.name: agentic_system_workflow
tools.description: SEP-1577 sampling-driven multi-step admin workflow. Uses ctx.sample() to orchestrate autonomous diagnostics.

tools.name: autonomous_system_troubleshooter
tools.description: Three-phase autonomous diagnosis: health/events/processes scan, sampling analysis, root cause identification.

tools.name: list_volumes
tools.description: List all available volumes with drive letter and type.

tools.name: get_file_owner
tools.description: Get the owner of a file or directory including SID.

tools.name: recover_file
tools.description: Attempt NTFS file recovery for a deleted file.

tools.name: get_disk_usage
tools.description: Get disk usage information for a path.

tools.name: get_process_info
tools.description: Get information about a running process by PID.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Basic connectivity check for the MCP server.

tools.name: get_system_info
tools.description: Get comprehensive system information (OS, hardware, environment).

tools.name: help
tools.description: Get help on available tools and their usage.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Get server status and health information.

tools.name: list_startup_programs
tools.description: List programs that start with Windows from registry and startup folder.

tools.name: add_startup_program
tools.description: Add a program to Windows startup (HKCU or HKLM).

tools.name: remove_startup_program
tools.description: Remove a program from Windows startup.

tools.name: get_taskbar_settings
tools.description: Get current taskbar autohide and lock settings.

tools.name: set_taskbar_autohide
tools.description: Enable or disable taskbar autohide.

tools.name: scan_volume
tools.description: Scan NTFS volume for deleted files using PowerShell.

tools.name: recover_file_ntfs
tools.description: Recover a deleted file from NTFS volume.

tools.name: validate_recovery
tools.description: Validate recovered file integrity with SHA-256 hash.

tools.name: get_permissions
tools.description: Get file/folder permissions and ACLs.

tools.name: set_permissions
tools.description: Set file/folder permissions with inheritance support.

tools.name: remove_permission
tools.description: Remove specific permission from file/folder.

tools.name: take_ownership
tools.description: Take ownership of file or folder.

tools.name: audit_permissions
tools.description: Audit permissions and identify security issues.

tools.name: check_disk_health
tools.description: Check disk SMART status and health via WMI.

tools.name: analyze_disk_usage_advanced
tools.description: Advanced disk usage analysis with folder breakdown.

tools.name: disk_cleanup
tools.description: Clean up disk space by removing temp files.

tools.name: defragment_disk
tools.description: Defragment HDD (do not use on SSDs).

tools.name: optimize_ssd
tools.description: Optimize SSD with TRIM operation.

tools.name: get_hardware_info
tools.description: Get comprehensive hardware information via WMI and psutil.

tools.name: get_os_info
tools.description: Get operating system information.

tools.name: get_installed_software
tools.description: Get list of installed software from registry.

tools.name: get_performance_metrics
tools.description: Get real-time performance metrics.

tools.name: get_event_log
tools.description: Query Windows event logs with filtering.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Perform comprehensive system health check.

tools.name: get_volume_info
tools.description: Get detailed volume information.

tools.name: get_recent_event_errors
tools.description: Get recent Error and Warning events from Windows Event Logs.

tools.name: audit_network_ports
tools.description: List all processes listening on network ports.

tools.name: get_top_resource_processes
tools.description: Find top processes consuming CPU and memory.

tools.name: check_system_health_status
tools.description: Check system health status with warnings.

tools.name: analyze_top_folder_sizes
tools.description: Find the top largest folders on a drive by size.
